name: Cauliflower Soup (Minestra Di Cavalfiore)
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the cauliflower florets into small (1/2 inch) pieces.
2. Trim the stem end and cut into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Wash the cauliflower in 2 quarts of cold water blended with 2 tablespoons vinegar. Drain and drop into a large pot of boiling salted water.
4. Boil for 4 minutes, then drain and dry well.
5. Heat the olive oil in a soup pot; add the garlic and hot pepper flakes, and cook gently until the garlic is golden.
6. Add the cauliflower and cook for 5 minutes, stirring to prevent it from browning.
7. Add the hot broth, salt, and parsley, and cook until the cauliflower is tender.
8. Ladle into soup bowls and sprinkle with a generous amount of grated pecorino cheese.
Serves 6.
